flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at American River College rose 43% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $5.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at American River College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.2k → $12.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at American River College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at American River College rose 39% between 2007 and 2010 (22.3k → 31.0k).
